rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
rule_metadata.title: Suspicious Child Process Of Manage Engine ServiceDesk

rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious Child Process Of Manage Engine ServiceDesk
id: cea2b7ea-792b-405f-95a1-b903ea06458f
status: test
description: Detects suspicious child processes of the "Manage Engine ServiceDesk
  Plus" Java web service
references:
- https://www.horizon3.ai/manageengine-cve-2022-47966-technical-deep-dive/
- https://github.com/horizon3ai/CVE-2022-47966/blob/3a51c6b72ebbd87392babd955a8fbeaee2090b35/CVE-2022-47966.py
- https://blog.viettelcybersecurity.com/saml-show-stopper/
author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
date: 2023-01-18
modified: 2023-08-29
tags:
- attack.command-and-control
- attack.t1102
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|contains|all:
    - \ManageEngine\ServiceDesk\
    - \java.exe
    Image|endswith:
    - \AppVLP.exe
    - \bash.exe
    - \bitsadmin.exe
    - \calc.exe
    - \certutil.exe
    - \cscript.exe
    - \curl.exe
    - \forfiles.exe
    - \mftrace.exe
    - \mshta.exe
    - \net.exe
    - \net1.exe
    - \notepad.exe
    - \powershell.exe
    - \pwsh.exe
    - \query.exe
    - \reg.exe
    - \schtasks.exe
    - \scrcons.exe
    - \sh.exe
    - \systeminfo.exe
    - \whoami.exe
    - \wmic.exe
    - \wscript.exe
  filter_main_net:
    Image|endswith:
    - \net.exe
    - \net1.exe
    CommandLine|contains: ' stop'
  condition: selection and not 1 of filter_main_*
falsepositives:
- Legitimate sub processes started by Manage Engine ServiceDesk Pro
level: high
